name: Curry-Lime Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lime juice and mustard, blending well.
2. Add the garlic.
3. Whisk in the mayonnaise.
4. Blend in the spices until almost smooth.
5. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Chicken Drumettes, Onion Crackers, Chicory, Cauliflower
